feed.description: Scuba diving stories and skills: safety, marine life, travel, and calm thinking underwater.

bullets:
# Below the Surface — Episode
## Plan the Dive, Manage the Risk
Host: Rina
Guest: Marco Silva
#fixture-v3: voice=pt-BR host_voice=en-US
Rina: Welcome back to Below the Surface.
I'm joined by Marco Silva, technical diver and instructor.
Marco, thanks for surfacing for us.
